title: Cost to Mint
description: The economics block on every receipt. Baseline target: $0.0052/deed (per docs/doctrine/09_energy_and_cost_to_mint.md). Includes electricity · hardware depreciation · chain overhead · the resulting fee tier · gross margin.

receipt_id.description: FK to the receipt this cost belongs to

electricity_usd.description: Energy cost in USD for this deed (kWh × rate)

depreciation_usd.description: Hardware depreciation allocated to this deed

chain_overhead_usd.description: Hedera HCS submission fees + ENS amortized cost

storage_usd.description: NAS + L1 PostgreSQL storage cost amortized to this deed

validator_usd.description: Tribunal Scale A + Scale B inference cost

fee_tier.description: Customer-facing pricing tier this deed lands in

margin_pct.description: Gross margin percentage at the published price for this tier
